reason: Enabling Certmap in SSSD involves configuring specific certificate mapping rules in sssd.conf. Incorrect configuration of these rules can lead to authentication failures for users or groups relying on certificate-based identity, potentially causing a lockout from the system or critical services.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Incorrect matchrule or maprule syntax can break authentication; Misconfiguration may prevent valid users from accessing the system; Requires existing knowledge of the specific certificate attributes and domain structure
